trigger_command:
git add -A && git commit -m "Add trimVideo command — extract portions of video files

Trim videos by start/end time or duration. Default: stream copy
(instant, lossless, same format). Use --codec to re-encode.
Supports all ffmpeg time formats (HH:MM:SS, seconds, ms).
Output auto-named as input_trimmed.ext if -o not specified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>" && git push 2>&1 | tail -3
